sections.paragraph:
Original: צו צו

Transliteration: tsav tsâv

Phonetic: tsav

BDB Definition:

  1. command, ordinance, oracle (meaning dubious)
    1. used in mocking mimicry of Isaiah's words and thus not a true divine command

Origin: from H6680

TWOT entry: 1887c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
